mapper:
SELECT id AS id, status AS status, total_price AS totalPrice FROM ORDERS WHERE id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE
<<<<<<< HEAD
INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( order_id, coupon_id, method, amount, card_company, payment_time, payment_status, pg_transaction_id, point_used, point_earned ) VALUES ( #{payment.orderId}, #{payment.couponId}, #{payment.method}, #{payment.amount}, #{payment.cardCompany}, NOW(), '승인', #{pgId}, COALESCE(#{payment.pointUsed}, 0), COALESCE(#{payment.pointEarned}, 0) )
=======
SELECT MAX(waiting_no) FROM ORDERS
UPDATE ORDERS SET status = #{status}, waiting_no = #{waitingNo} WHERE id = #{orderId}
>>>>>>> origin/feature/firebase
<<<<<<< HEAD
UPDATE ORDERS SET status = #{status}, waiting_no = #{waitingNo} WHERE id = #{orderId}
=======
SELECT oi.id AS orderItemId, s.name AS sizeName, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.total_price AS price, -- 선택한 맛들을 쉼표로 자동 결합 (예: 바닐라, 초코, 그린티) GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.name ORDER BY oim.id SEPARATOR ', ') AS flavors, -- 추가 옵션들을 쉼표로 자동 결합 (예: 초코 코팅 추가) GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mo.name ORDER BY oio.id SEPARATOR ', ') AS options FROM ORDERITEM oi LEFT JOIN SIZE s ON oi.size_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ORDERITEMMENU oim ON oi.id = oim.order_item_id LEFT JOIN MENU m ON oim.menu_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ORDERITEMOPTION oio ON oi.id = oio.order_item_id LEFT JOIN MENU_OPTION mo ON oio.menu_option_id = mo.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY oi.id, s.name, oi.quantity, oi.total_price ORDER BY oi.id
>>>>>>> origin/feature/firebase
SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.receipt_no AS receiptNo, o.waiting_no AS waitingNo,
/* 할인 전 주문 금액 */ o.total_price AS originalAmount,
/* * 현재 PAYMENT 테이블에 coupon_discount 컬럼이 없으므로 * 다음 계산으로 실제 쿠폰 할인액을 추정한다. * * 주문 원금 - 실제 결제 금액 - 사용 포인트 */ GREATEST( 0, o.total_price - COALESCE(p.amount, o.total_price) - COALESCE(p.point_used, 0) ) AS couponDiscount,
COALESCE( p.point_used, 0 ) AS pointUsed,
/* * 실제 총 할인 금액 * 할인 전 금액 - 실제 결제 금액 */ GREATEST( 0, o.total_price - COALESCE(p.amount, o.total_price) ) AS totalDiscount,
COALESCE( p.amount, o.total_price ) AS finalAmount,
COALESCE( p.point_earned, 0 ) AS pointEarned,
DATE_FORMAT( COALESCE( p.payment_time, o.created_at ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS orderTime,
p.method AS paymentMethod, p.card_company AS cardCompany, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, p.pg_transaction_id AS pgTransactionId,
p.coupon_id AS couponId, c.name AS couponName
FROM ORDERS o
LEFT JOIN PAYMENT p ON p.id = ( SELECT MAX(p2.id) FROM PAYMENT p2 WHERE p2.order_id = o.id )
LEFT JOIN COUPON c ON c.id = p.coupon_id
WHERE o.id = #{orderId}
SELECT oi.id AS orderItemId,
GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT m.name ORDER BY oim.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS menuName,
oi.quantity AS quantity,
CASE WHEN oi.quantity IS NULL OR oi.quantity <= 0 THEN COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0)
ELSE FLOOR( COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0) / oi.quantity ) END AS price,
COALESCE( oi.total_price, 0 ) AS totalPrice,
oi.cup_id AS cupId, oi.size_id AS sizeId
FROM ORDERITEM oi
LEFT JOIN ORDERITEMMENU oim ON oi.id = oim.order_item_id
LEFT JOIN MENU m ON oim.menu_id = m.id
WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
GROUP BY oi.id, oi.quantity, oi.total_price, oi.cup_id, oi.size_id
ORDER BY oi.id ASC
